codeReview.summary: Feature correctly implements the observability event schema with all required fields. Implementation is clean with proper validation, serialization, and comprehensive tests. Code compiles and passes clippy.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The working tree version of events.rs has been significantly expanded beyond what was committed for this feature. Commit 404f7f2 added 437 lines implementing the core event schema (trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id, agent_id, session_id, task_id, tool_invocation, timestamp, outcome). The current working tree has 1072 lines with additional fields (root_trace_id, cross_task_correlation_id, agent_session_id, request_id) and EventStore that are NOT part of the observability-event-schema feature description. This appears to be work from a subsequent feature that was mixed into the same file without proper feature boundaries.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git diff 404f7f2 -- crates/swell-core/src/events.rs shows +635 lines of additions including CrossTaskCorrelationId, AgentSessionId, RequestId, EventStore types that are not in the feature description

summary: The observability-event-schema feature passes review. All 9 required fields (trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id, agent_id, session_id, task_id, tool_invocation, timestamp, outcome) are correctly implemented with proper validation, serialization, and 14 passing tests. However, a shared state observation is recorded regarding subsequent modifications to events.rs that expanded beyond this feature's scope without proper boundaries.
